name: service-interface-pattern
description: Service Interface pattern: IAuthService in auth/types.ts defines contract, SupabaseAuthService and MockAuthService implement. Teams will need ITeamsService, IPermissionService.
relevantCode: export interface IAuthService { signUp, signIn, signOut, getSession, onAuthStateChange }
recommendation: Create ITeamsService interface for org/team/membership CRUD, IPermissionService for permission resolution
